title: Probe Agency Raids 32nd Avenue Group In Rs 500 Crore Scam, Seizes Cash, Gold
description: New Delhi, April 16 (IANS In fresh action in a Rs 500 crore ponzi scheme fraud, the ED searched seven premises across Delhi-NCR, Goa, Jaipur and Mumbai linked to 32nd Avenue Group and seized Rs 1.05 crore cash and jewellery items worth Rs 1.5 crore,
